75054.subject: Turn Claude Into an AI Research Powerhouse With Stanford's STORM Method рҹ§
75054.body:
View this post on the web at https://linas.substack.com/p/stanford-storm-claude-ai-research

рҹ‘Ӣ Hey, Linas here! Every day, I break down 3 stories shaping the future of FinTech & Artificial Intelligence - plus the money movements and trends worth tracking. First time here? 395k+ FinTech and AI leaders get this daily. Join them:
Almost everyone still uses Claude the same way: type вҖңresearch X,вҖқ get back the most obvious consensus framing of X.
It reads well. It is also exactly what your competitor gets when they type the same thing.
Turns out, the edge was never in the answer. It was in the questions nobody thought to ask.
StanfordвҖҷs STORM method exists to fix that problem. STORM - Synthesis of Topic Outlines through Retrieval and Multi-perspective Question Asking - was built by the Stanford OVAL Lab to research a topic from many expert perspectives, ground every claim in real sources, and write only after an outline is stable. In the Stanford teamвҖҷs evaluation, STORM articles were judged better organized by a 25-percentage-point margin over outline-driven retrieval-augmented baselines, and broader in coverage by 10 points.
The catch: the original method was designed as a Python codebase, not a workflow you can run in a chat window, so almost nobody captures its full power inside Claude.
This guide rebuilds it as Boardroom STORM: a decision-grade workflow you run inside Claude, with full attribution to the Stanford research it adapts. Instead of five generic вҖңexpert views,вҖқ Claude generates ten decision-relevant perspectives, runs source-grounded interviews for each, maintains a contradiction ledger, synthesizes a source-mapped outline, drafts only from that outline, and finishes with a Co-STORM-style moderator pass that hunts for the unknown unknowns most reports never surface.
Below, we cover the full system end-to-end:
The academic foundation explained in plain language
The six-stage operating model
All nine copy-paste prompts
Worked examples for founders, investors, & builders, and
A ready-made Claude Skill file you upload once and trigger with a single sentence
If you make decisions where being early and being right actually matters, this is the difference between AI that summarizes what everyone already knows and AI that finds what they missed.
The academic foundation - what is STORM...

Unsubscribe https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9saW5hcy5zdWJzdGFjay5jb20vYWN0aW9uL2Rpc2FibGVfZW1haWw_.ZWRbCYissXAb1U-9mRUYSLook8llBr3x10ceG_a45nQ?

75049.subject: EЕЎte stГЎle chcete maЕҘ svoj Еҫivotopis sprГӯstupnenГҪ v databГЎze Profesie?
75049.body: EЕЎte stГЎle chcete maЕҘ svoj Еҫivotopis sprГӯstupnenГҪ v databГЎze Profesie? ( https://www.profesia.sk/?utm_medium=mail&utm_source=10251&utm_campaign=10251&utm_term=2026-06-25&utm_content=logo ) *EЕЎte stГЎle chcete maЕҘ svoj Еҫivotopis sprГӯstupnenГҪ v databГЎze Profesie?* DobrГҪ deЕҲ, uЕҫ je to pГЎr tГҪЕҫdЕҲov, odkedy ste vo VaЕЎom Еҫivotopise neurobili Еҫiadnu aktivitu. Chcete ho aj naДҸalej ponechaЕҘ sprГӯstupnenГҪ pre firmy na Profesii? V prГӯpade, ak si uЕҫ nehДҫadГЎte prГЎcu, odporГәДҚame Еҫivotopis oznaДҚiЕҘ ako nesprГӯstupnenГҪ. Firmy VГЎs tak nebudГә oslovovaЕҘ s nerelevantnГҪmi ponukami prГЎce. *SkryЕҘ Еҫivotopis pred firmami* ( http://www.profesia.sk/uchadzac/zivotopis/4a0f35da-0e73-11f0-aae6-7d677da0b825?utm_medium=mail&utm_source=10251&utm_campaign=10251&utm_term=2026-06-25&utm_content=call-to-action ) Prajeme VГЎm prГӯjemnГҪ deЕҲ, tГӯm Profesia V prГӯpade otГЎzok kontaktujte Oddelenie podpory zГЎkaznГӯkov. В© 1997-2026 Alma Career Slovakia

naЕҲ. Adresa kancelГЎrie: First Floor, 25 St Stephens Green, Dublin 2, Ireland В UpozorЕҲujeme, Еҫe na tejto adrese sa vrГЎtenie tovaru neprijГӯma. Ak chcete vrГЎ

75044.subject: PozvГЎnka na vstup do aplikГЎcie SBA educa
75044.body: DobrГҪ deЕҲ, Na zГЎklade Гәhrady FA za odbornГә skГәЕЎku, VГЎm zasielame prГӯstup na vzdelГЎvanie do aplikГЎcie SBAeduca. VzdelГЎvanie je zadarmo a ponГәkame VГЎm ho ako moЕҫnosЕҘ prГӯpravy na skГәЕЎku. Pre prvГ© prihlГЎsenie do aplikГЎcie kliknite na nasledujГәci link https://www.sbaeduca.sk/Prihlasenie?iduser=130088&code=Gjizezcx Po prihlГЎsenГӯ zadajte novГ© heslo. NovГ© heslo musГӯ obsahovaЕҘ minimГЎlne 8 znakov, priДҚom aspoЕҲ jedno z nich musГӯ byЕҘ ДҚГӯslo. Pri prvom prihlГЎsenГӯ eЕЎte pred vytvorenГӯm novГ©ho hesla budete 2x vyzvanГҪ na sГәhlas so spracovanГӯm osobnГҪch Гәdajov. Po zadanГӯ hesla uЕҫ tento link nebude fungovaЕҘ. Prihlasovanie potom prebieha cez strГЎnku www.sbaeduca.sk. Prihlasovacie meno je VaЕЎa emailovГЎ adresa a heslo je to, ktorГ© ste si zvolili pri prvom prihlГЎsenГӯ. Ak heslo zabudnete, na naЕЎej strГЎnke v ДҚasti prihlГЎsenie je moЕҫnosЕҘ poslaЕҘ si novГҪ prihlasovacГӯ link. вҖ“вҖ“вҖ“вҖ“вҖ“вҖ“вҖ“вҖ“вҖ“вҖ“вҖ“вҖ“- Ak ste uЕҫ mali prГӯstup do aplikГЎcie a poЕҫiadali ste o novГ© heslo, tak VaЕЎe starГ© heslo platГӯ do zadania novГ©ho hesla. Ak nie je moЕҫnГ© kliknГәЕҘ na link, skopГӯrujte ho do adresnГ©ho riadku VГЎЕЎho internetovГ©ho prehliadaДҚa a stlaДҚte ENTER. V prГӯpade potreby kontaktujte: podpora@sbaeduca.sk вҖ“вҖ“вҖ“вҖ“вҖ“вҖ“вҖ“вҖ“вҖ“вҖ“вҖ“вҖ“- PoznГЎmka: ProsГӯm neodpovedajte na tento e-mail. E-mail bol vygenerovanГҪ automaticky.
